case_title: CLAIFORNIA BUILDERS HARDWARE CO. VS J & K SALES,INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,869.70 FILED BY CLAIFORNIA BUILDERS HARDWARE CO. AS TO DEFENDANT J & K SALES,INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-05-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
